pitch_by_priority.P1: You had shown interest in the complimentary consultation. I can complete the booking now. Would you prefer the earliest available slot or your preferred date and time?
pitch_by_priority.P2: This consultation is available under your health benefit. I can reserve either the earliest available slot or a time convenient for you. Which option should I confirm?
pitch_by_priority.P3: This complimentary consultation is available under your health benefit. When would be a good time for us to call you back and help you book a convenient slot?

pitch_by_objection.Timing or Callback: As requested, I am calling back to help complete your booking. Would today evening or tomorrow morning be more convenient?
pitch_by_objection.Slot Availability: Your preferred slot was unavailable earlier. I now have alternate options and can confirm one immediately. Which timing would be most convenient?
pitch_by_objection.Technical Issue: I understand there was a technical issue while booking earlier. I can complete this manually for you right now. Shall we proceed?
pitch_by_objection.Price Concern: Before you decide, let me explain the benefits and savings available under your plan. This may reduce or eliminate your out-of-pocket cost.
pitch_by_objection.Trust Concern: This call is regarding a benefit available under your registered health plan. We will use only the minimum required information to confirm eligibility and complete the service.
pitch_by_objection.Offer Not Understood: This is a complimentary consultation included in your health benefit. There is no consultation charge. May I book a suitable slot for you?
pitch_by_objection.Language Barrier: Reconnect with the customer in their preferred language and explain the benefit in one simple sentence before requesting consent.
pitch_by_objection.Early Disconnect: Reconnect with the customer, briefly reintroduce the benefit, and confirm a convenient time to talk.
pitch_by_objection.Unresponsive: Attempt contact through an alternate channel such as WhatsApp or SMS before the next call attempt.
pitch_by_objection.Service Complaint: First acknowledge and resolve the existing concern. Do not attempt a new conversion pitch until the customer confirms that the issue is resolved.
pitch_by_objection.Report Delay: Acknowledge the delay, provide an updated timeline for the report, and offer to follow up once it is ready.
pitch_by_objection.Technician Delay: Acknowledge the delay in the technician visit, apologise for the inconvenience, and offer the next available appointment.
